	add A, 07h
	nop
	anl A, 48h
	inc A
	subb A, 03h
	mov DPTR, #dptr_3888
	addc A, R1
	nop
	swap A
	dec R1
	add A, #31h	;  49 '1'
	jc jump_FFFC
	div AB
	orl A, @R0
	movx A, @DPTR
jump_FFE7:
	mov R0, #2Eh	;  46 '.'
	nop
	push 07h
	dec R6
	subb A, R6
	add A, R6
	div AB
	ajmp jump_F800

	nop
	nop
dptr_FFF4:
	inc A
	mov R3, A
dptr_FFF6:
	nop
	nop
	nop
	inc A
	nop
	nop
jump_FFFC:
	anl A, R7
	dec R4
	mov A, R6
	addc A, R7

end
